stem: We can live no longer, ___ well society and our doctors look after us.
explanation: 考点:让步状语。however well 表「无论多么妥善地」，引导让步状语从句。

stem: It is one of the most unpleasant discoveries ___ we all make that we must decline in this way.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 discoveries 在从句中作 make 的宾语，用 which/that。

stem: Ageing is a process ___ differs little from person to person at a given rate.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 process 在从句中作主语，用 that/which。

stem: ___ lucky and robust we are, there is a virtual limit on how long we can hope to remain alive.
explanation: 考点:让步状语。However + adj + 主语 + 谓语，表无论多么……。

stem: We gradually lose the power to repair ourselves between twelve and eighty, however well we ___ (look) after ourselves.
explanation: 考点:主动语态。主语 we 与 look after 为主动关系。

stem: Intermittent tap-water supplies ___ as particularly suspect.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。supply 是被视为的对象，用 should be regarded as。

stem: Contamination of water supplies is usually ___ to poor sanitation close to water sources.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。be due to 表原因，后接名词。

stem: Water from unknown sources ___ before drinking.
explanation: 考点:情态动词被动。水应被煮沸，用 should be boiled。

stem: Alcohol should not be ___ upon to sterilize water.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。rely upon 的被动 be relied upon。

stem: Intermittent tap-water supplies should be ___ (regard) as particularly suspect.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。should be regarded as 被动态。

stem: The talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that ___.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 drafts 复数，从句谓语用 follow。

stem: In the breaking and remaking, the writer comes to discern things in his material which were not consciously in his mind when he ___.
explanation: 考点:定语从句+时态。时间状语从句用一般过去时 began。

stem: Writing to please can be his undoing: he has begun ___ to please.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。begin to do 开始做某事。

stem: Writers talk interminably about their own books, ___ out hidden meanings.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。现在分词 winkling 表伴随动作。

stem: The talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that ___ (follow).
explanation: 考点:定语从句。定语从句谓语与先行词 drafts 一致，用 follow。

stem: ___ an ocean wave gives the impression of a wall of water, the water stays where it was.
explanation: 考点:让步状语。although 引导让步从句，主句不用 but。

stem: Waves move through the water ___ the water about where it was.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。现在分词 leaving 表结果。

stem: Each particle moves in a roughly circular ___ as the wave passes.
explanation: 考点:词汇。orbit 表轨道、轨迹。

stem: Gravity is the force that drives them in a continual attempt ___ the ocean surface to a flat plain.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。attempt 后接不定式 to restore。

stem: Although a wave gives the impression of a wall of water, the water stays about where it ___ (be).
explanation: 考点:一般现在时/过去时。陈述事实可用 is 或 was。

stem: The former method produces a resentful animal ___ at a later stage may turn man-killer.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 animal 指动物，从句作主语用 who/that。

stem: The gentle method simply consists ___ setting an elephant to work and beating him.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。consist of 固定搭配。

stem: Elephants ___ by cruel methods never fully trust their handlers.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。elephants 与 train 被动，用过去分词 trained。

stem: The relationship between elephant and mahout is the key ___ successful training.
explanation: 考点:词汇。the key to 固定搭配。

stem: A tame elephant may be ___ (tether) nearby to give the wild one confidence.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。may be tethered 被拴住。

stem: If the shock ___ gentle, only the more unstable rods fell.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。if + were 表假设，与事实可能相反。

stem: ___ the shock violent, every rod would topple.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。Were 置句首省略 if，构成倒装虚拟条件句。

stem: Its movement would be ___ in ink upon the surface of the paper.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。movement 被记录，用 would be recorded。

stem: A weight on a string moves only slightly when the hand is shaken, while the pen stays ___.
explanation: 考点:词汇。stay still 保持静止。

stem: If the shock ___ (be) gentle, only the more unstable rods fell.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。if + were 虚拟假设。

stem: ___ a planet only approximately like our own, life is almost certain to start.
explanation: 考点:条件句。Given + 名词短语表「给定/假设」。

stem: The Earth is the only one on ___ life can survive.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。on which = where，介词 + which。

stem: If intelligent beings exist elsewhere, they ___ use radio waves to communicate.
explanation: 考点:条件句。第一类条件句，主句 may 表可能。

stem: Radio waves travel at the speed of light, ___ our chemical rockets cannot match.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。which 指代前面整句或 speed。

stem: Our galaxy ___ (contain) billions of stars.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。陈述事实用一般现在时 contains。

stem: It is from the moment of his birth ___ custom shapes his experience.
explanation: 考点:强调句。It is from ... that 强调时间起点。

stem: We are so familiar with the fact ___ man ages that we assume the process is self-evident.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。the fact that 从句解释 fact 内容，that 不可省。

stem: The customs into ___ he is born shape his behaviour.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。into which = where，介词 + which。

stem: The predominant role ___ custom plays in experience is of first-rate importance.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。role 在从句中作 plays 的宾语，用 that/which。

stem: Cultural ___ (pattern) vary widely between societies.
explanation: 考点:主谓一致。复数主语 patterns，vary 用原形。

stem: Twenty or thirty pages of ideas ___ capable of turning the world upside down.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。would be capable of 表假设下的可能结果。

stem: Our environment is chiefly conditioned by the things ___.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。things (that) we believe，省略关系代词。

stem: On a galactic timescale, human history is ___.
explanation: 考点:词汇。negligible 表微不足道的。

stem: If we could view the universe from outside, we ___ see its true scale.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。if + could，主句 would do。

stem: Distances in space are measured in light ___ (year).
explanation: 考点:固定搭配。light years 光年，复数。

stem: It is no use ___ late in life to say you will take an interest.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。it is no use + doing。

stem: Such an attempt only ___ the strain of mental effort.
explanation: 考点:词汇辨析。aggravate 表加重负担。

stem: Active hobbies are ___ to passive amusement.
explanation: 考点:词汇。be preferable to 优于。

stem: Fortune's favoured children belong to the class ___ work and pleasure are one.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。whose 表所属，work and pleasure are one。

stem: An ___ (absorb) hobby drives out petty worries.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词。absorbing 现在分词作定语，表令人着迷的。

stem: ___, a snobbery of camping based on equipment already exists.
explanation: 考点:让步状语。Granted 置于句首表「诚然」。

stem: The man who ___ carelessly into his twenty pounds' worth of space may find himself bumping a Bentley.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。定语从句中谓语与 who 一致，第三人称单数 manoeuvres。

stem: Holiday hotels tend to cater for one nationality; camping sites are highly ___.
explanation: 考点:词汇。cosmopolitan 表国际化的。

stem: From all such fears camping ___ him.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。陈述事实用 releases。

stem: Camping ___ (release) him from hotel hierarchies.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。主语 camping 单数，用 releases。

stem: If you are older, preserving capital and generating income ___ your main priorities.
explanation: 考点:条件句。两个动名词作主语，谓语用复数 are。

stem: Every serious investor needs a portfolio that ___ a definite structure.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 portfolio 单数，从句谓语 has。

stem: There is no single right way to invest, ___ putting every penny into one venture is wrong.
explanation: 考点:并列连词。yet 表转折「然而/却」。

stem: Younger investors may accept greater ___ in pursuit of growth.
explanation: 考点:词汇。accept 后接名词 volatility。

stem: You should ___ (diversify) across assets that behave differently.
explanation: 考点:情态动词。should + 动词原形 diversify。
